name: Maldives
plugDescriptions: Type A — Two flat parallel pins (North American/Japanese style)
Type C — Two round pins (Europlug, most common worldwide)
Type D — Three large round pins in triangle (India/South Asia)
Type G — Three rectangular pins (British style)
Type J — Three round pins (Swiss style)
Type K — Three round pins (Danish style)
Type L — Three round pins in a line (Italian style)
adapterNotes: Many plug types encountered. Most resorts provide universal outlets.
